recommendations.title: The Docks of New York
recommendations.overview: A blue-collar worker on New York's depressed waterfront finds his life changed after he saves a woman attempting suicide.

recommendations.title: Morocco
recommendations.overview: Mogador, Morocco. Late 1920s. A complex romance develops between a womanizing Legionnaire and a disillusioned Parisian cabaret singer.

recommendations.title: Shanghai Express
recommendations.overview: A beautiful temptress re-kindles an old romance while trying to escape her past during a tension-packed train journey.

recommendations.title: Blonde Venus
recommendations.overview: In an effort to be able to afford expensive treatment for her gravely ill American husband, a retired German entertainer returns to the cabaret as Blonde Venus and catches the eye of a wealthy politician.

recommendations.title: The Scarlet Empress

recommendations.title: Lola
recommendations.overview: Germany in the autumn of 1957: Lola, a seductive cabaret singer-prostitute exults in her power as a temptress of men, but she wants out—she wants money, property, and love. Pitting a corrupt building contractor against the new straight-arrow building

recommendations.title: Run Lola Run
recommendations.overview: Lola receives a phone call from her boyfriend Manni. He lost 100,000 DM in a subway train that belongs to a very bad guy. She has 20 minutes to raise this amount and meet Manni. Otherwise, he will rob a store to get the money. Three different alterna

recommendations.title: Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen
recommendations.overview: After moving to New Jersey, Lola bags a coveted role in a school play, which earns her the wrath of Carla, the most popular girl in school, who will do anything to ruin Lola's life.

recommendations.title: Carmen & Lola
